[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0000101011 4
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0010010110 4
6 1001101101 6
7 0101110111 7

70 07 0010000010 2
